intentional_fixes: Removed unmatched closing brace at original stylesheet line 172.
feature_updates: Added official Bungie public-manifest icons for subclass abilities, exotic armor, exotic weapons, real weapons, and real armor.
Added lazy exact-name icon resolution with hash/icon preference, request deduplication, viewport loading, and localStorage caching.
Replaced the fixed vault bucket whitelist with live DestinyInventoryBucketDefinition grouping so all returned inventory buckets render.
Added ProfileCurrencies presentation for Glimmer, Bright Dust, and other account currencies.
Added stack quantity, lock state, account-inventory classification, equipment classification, and non-transferable item handling.
Added ItemReusablePlugs component 310 and manifest plug-set expansion for DIM-style vertical perk columns.
Reworked the item detail overview into a DIM-inspired summary, perk matrix, inspector, description, stats, utility sockets, and action bar.
